name: Takeshido Racing Spec
desc: Pasively cancels out lateral momentum to the ship and multiplies their effective speed by 6x. Additionally allows drifting. Drift: press A or D to enter drift. While drifting, reverse thrust, deceleration, and strafing are blocked but lateral velocity is allowed. Drift ends when velocity aligns with facing.

name: Takeshido Powertrain
desc: Increases top speed by %s. Acceleration scales down as speed approaches max, bottoming out at %s of normal. Increases max burn by %s. Reduces weapon flux cost to %s of normal. Weapon rate of fire and projectile speed scale with current speed.
short: Boosts speed; accel tapers near max.
